# PURIST — Business Automation & AI Agent Agency

> PURIST builds and deploys production-grade workflow automation and AI agents for SMBs and scaling companies. We specialise in n8n, Make, Zapier, and Claude AI agent deployments across dental practices, real estate property management, marketing agencies, DTC e-commerce, commercial law firms, and staffing agencies.
>
> Founded in London. Serving UK, US and international clients. 500+ production deployments. 99.97% uptime across all managed systems.

## About

PURIST is not a software platform. It is a specialist automation engineering firm that designs, builds, monitors, and maintains production-grade automation systems for businesses. Every deployment includes error handling, monitoring, retry logic, documentation, and an SLA.

Primary services: workflow automation, AI agent deployment, operations stack design, CRM data quality automation.

## Services

- [Automation Pro](https://purist.online/products/foundation-pro) — 9 core production workflows covering lead capture, CRM sync, email sequences, invoicing, reporting, client onboarding, AI support routing, smart scheduling, and monitoring. From £497/mo.
- [AI Agent Deploy](https://purist.online/products/longevity-protocol) — Conversational AI agents trained on client business data. Handles scheduling, intake, lead qualification, support routing. From £897/mo.
- [The Full Stack](https://purist.online/products/founder-stack) — Automation Pro + AI Agent Deploy. Full operational transformation. From £1,197/mo.
- [Free AI Readiness Audit](https://purist.online/pages/welcome) — Free 48h audit of your current workflows and automation opportunities.

## Blog — Full Article Index (50 articles)

All articles are written by PURIST's engineering team from real production deployments.

### Tools & Platforms
- [The Future of Automation: How Our Engineering Team Is Shaping the Next Era](https://purist.online/pages/blog/future-of-automation-engineering-team) — Architecture patterns, orchestrated agent systems, shared state, error handling at scale.
- [n8n Tutorial: Build Your First Production Workflow in Under an Hour (2026)](https://purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-tutorial-build-first-production-workflow-2026) — Step-by-step guide to deploying your first production n8n workflow.
- [n8n vs Make vs Zapier: The Honest Comparison](https://purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-vs-make-vs-zapier-honest-comparison) — Platform comparison for simple vs complex vs high-volume automation needs.
- [n8n vs Make vs Zapier: 500 Production Deployments](https://purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-vs-make-vs-zapier-500-production-deployments) — Data-driven comparison from real deployments: error rates, cost at scale, debugging.
- [The 9 Best Zapier Alternatives in 2026](https://purist.online/pages/blog/best-zapier-alternatives-2026-honest-review) — Ranked after 500 real deployments: n8n, Make, Pipedream, Activepieces and more.
- [Make.com Tutorial: Build Powerful Automations Without Code in 2026](https://purist.online/pages/blog/make-com-tutorial-automation-beginners-guide-2026) — Complete guide to Make.com from first workflow to production deployment.
- [Webhook vs Polling: The Automation Architecture Decision That Matters](https://purist.online/pages/blog/webhook-vs-polling-automation-architecture-decision) — When to use webhooks vs polling and how to build reliable webhook receivers.
- [Building a 24/7 Error Handling System for Automations](https://purist.online/pages/blog/building-24-7-error-handling-system-for-automations) — Node-level error routing, centralised logging, health monitoring, recovery runbooks.
- [Automation Consultant vs DIY: How to Decide](https://purist.online/pages/blog/automation-consultant-vs-diy-how-to-decide-2026) — Five criteria for deciding whether to build yourself or hire an expert.
- [n8n Self-Hosted vs Cloud: The Complete Decision Guide](https://purist.online/pages/blog/n8n-self-hosted-vs-cloud-complete-guide-2026) — Cost, security, compliance and scaling comparison from 500+ real deployments.
- [5 Zapier Free Alternatives That Handle Real Production Workloads](https://purist.online/pages/blog/zapier-free-alternatives-2026) — n8n, Make, Pipedream, Activepieces, Albato: honest limits and ceiling comparison.

### CRM & Sales Automation
- [CRM Automation: The Complete 2026 Guide to a Self-Running Sales Pipeline](https://purist.online/pages/blog/crm-automation-complete-guide-self-running-sales-pipeline-2026) — How to build a CRM that qualifies, nurtures and closes leads automatically.

- [Email Automation in 2026: Build Sequences That Convert](https://purist.online/pages/blog/email-automation-complete-guide-sequences-that-convert-2026) — Behaviour-triggered sequences that convert while you sleep.

- [HubSpot Automation: 10 Workflows That Turn Your CRM Into a Revenue Machine](https://purist.online/pages/blog/hubspot-automation-workflows-crm-revenue-2026) — Advanced HubSpot sequences most businesses never configure.
- [Notion Automation: Connect Your Workspace to Every Tool You Use](https://purist.online/pages/blog/notion-automation-connect-workspace-every-tool-2026) — How to make Notion the living nerve centre of your operations.
- [Lead Generation Automation: Build a 24/7 Prospecting Machine](https://purist.online/pages/blog/lead-generation-automation-prospecting-machine-2026) — Automated lead capture, enrichment, scoring and outreach.
- [Pipedrive Automation: 9 Workflows That Close Deals on Autopilot](https://purist.online/pages/blog/pipedrive-automation-workflows-close-deals-autopilot-2026) — Turn Pipedrive into a self-driving sales engine.
- [Sales Automation: Build a Pipeline That Works While Your Reps Sleep](https://purist.online/pages/blog/sales-automation-pipeline-works-while-reps-sleep-2026) — End-to-end sales automation from lead capture to closed deal.

### AI Agents & Intelligence
- [How to Build an AI Agent with n8n and Claude: The Complete Technical Guide](https://purist.online/pages/blog/how-to-build-ai-agent-n8n-claude-complete-guide) — Architecture, structured outputs, RAG, and production deployment.
- [AI Agents in 2026: What Actually Works vs What Is Still Hype](https://purist.online/pages/blog/ai-agents-in-2026-what-actually-works) — 95% of AI pilots fail. The 3 patterns that separate production AI from demo AI.
- [AI Agents in Production: What Actually Works vs What Sounds Good in Demos](https://purist.online/pages/blog/ai-agents-in-production-what-actually-works) — Structured output enforcement, RAG, confidence scoring, continuous evaluation.
- [Agentic AI in 2026: What It Actually Means for Your Business Operations](https://purist.online/pages/blog/agentic-ai-business-operations-what-it-means-2026) — What agentic AI is, what it is not, and which use cases are ready for production.
- [AI Customer Service Automation: Build a Support System That Never Sleeps](https://purist.online/pages/blog/ai-customer-service-automation-support-never-sleeps-2026) — From rule-based routing to full AI triage and response.
- [15 AI Agent Examples That Work in Real Businesses](https://purist.online/pages/blog/ai-agent-examples-real-business-use-cases-2026) — Production AI agent implementations with tools, architecture, and real ROI figures.

### Operations & Processes
- [How to Automate Your Business in 2026: The Complete Playbook](https://purist.online/pages/blog/how-to-automate-your-business-complete-playbook-2026) — Step-by-step framework for identifying and deploying automation across your operations.

- [Workflow Automation for Small Businesses: 12 Quick Wins Under £500](https://purist.online/pages/blog/workflow-automation-small-business-quick-wins-2026) — Fast ROI automations for businesses under 20 people.
- [Invoice Automation: Eliminate Manual Billing and Get Paid Faster](https://purist.online/pages/blog/invoice-automation-eliminate-manual-billing-get-paid-faster-2026) — Full invoicing automation from quote approval to payment reconciliation.
- [Customer Onboarding Automation: Deliver a 5-Star Experience at Scale](https://purist.online/pages/blog/customer-onboarding-automation-5-star-experience-scale-2026) — Build onboarding that impresses every client without manual effort.
- [E-Commerce Automation: 14 Workflows That Run Your Store While You Sleep](https://purist.online/pages/blog/ecommerce-automation-shopify-woocommerce-workflows-2026) — Shopify and WooCommerce automation for order management, CS, and inventory.
- [Data Entry Automation: Eliminate 90% of Manual Input with AI](https://purist.online/pages/blog/data-entry-automation-eliminate-manual-input-ai-2026) — AI-powered data extraction, validation and routing across systems.
- [Appointment Scheduling Automation: Zero No-Shows and Full Calendars](https://purist.online/pages/blog/appointment-scheduling-automation-zero-no-shows-2026) — 6-layer scheduling automation that cuts no-shows from 14% to under 3%.
- [Automated Reporting: Build Dashboards That Update Themselves](https://purist.online/pages/blog/automated-business-reporting-dashboards-update-themselves-2026) — Replace 8 hours of weekly reporting with self-updating dashboards.
- [HR Automation: 11 Processes You Should Stop Doing Manually](https://purist.online/pages/blog/hr-automation-processes-stop-doing-manually-2026) — From candidate screening to offboarding — automated.
- [50 Workflow Automation Examples Your Business Can Deploy Today](https://purist.online/pages/blog/workflow-automation-examples-50-ideas-2026) — Sales, marketing, ops, finance, HR, support — organized by department with tools.
- [Business Process Automation: The Complete Guide for 2026](https://purist.online/pages/blog/business-process-automation-complete-guide-2026) — Types, candidate identification, ROI calculation, implementation, common mistakes.

### Results & ROI
- [Calculating Automation ROI: The Honest Guide](https://purist.online/pages/blog/calculating-automation-roi-the-honest-guide) — Full formula including setup, maintenance, and opportunity costs agencies skip.
- [The Plumber Paradox: Why Free Tools Still Need Paid Experts](https://purist.online/pages/blog/the-plumber-paradox-why-free-tools-need-paid-experts) — Why n8n/Make/Zapier being free does not eliminate the need for expert implementation.
- [How a Dental Group Cut Front-Desk Time by 60%](https://purist.online/pages/blog/how-a-dental-group-saved-60-percent-front-desk-time) — Case study: booking automation, insurance pre-verification, appointment reminders.
- [How a Dental Group Cut Patient Admin by 60% Without Touching Their EMR](https://purist.online/pages/blog/how-a-dental-group-cut-patient-admin-by-60-percent) — Surrounding automation layer around a legacy EMR with contractual modification restrictions.
- [How We Automated a 45-Client Marketing Agency in 6 Weeks](https://purist.online/pages/blog/how-we-automated-a-45-client-marketing-agency-in-6-weeks) — Full technical breakdown: reporting, onboarding, client health scoring workflows.
- [7 Automation Mistakes That Kill ROI](https://purist.online/pages/blog/7-automation-mistakes-that-kill-roi) — The 7 architectural and strategic errors that destroy automation value.
- [How a 12-Person Real Estate Agency Automated 80% of Their Admin in 8 Weeks](https://purist.online/pages/blog/real-estate-agency-automation-case-study-80-percent-admin-2026) — Listing updates, tenant comms, maintenance routing — fully automated.
- [Marketing Agency Automation: Deliver More Clients With the Same Team](https://purist.online/pages/blog/marketing-agency-automation-deliver-more-clients-same-team-2026) — Two case studies, twelve automations, full playbook.
- [Healthcare Automation: 10 Workflows Every Medical Practice Needs](https://purist.online/pages/blog/healthcare-automation-medical-practice-workflows-2026) — Real results: dental 14%→3.2% no-shows, GP surgery 61% admin reduction.
- [Law Firm Automation: 12 Workflows That Cut Admin by 60%](https://purist.online/pages/blog/legal-firm-automation-workflows-2026) — PURIST case study: 12-solicitor firm, 61% admin reduction, payback in month 4.
- [Staffing Agency Automation: The Playbook for High-Volume Recruiting](https://purist.online/pages/blog/staffing-agency-automation-workflows-2026) — 15-person agency case study: 38% volume growth, zero new hires, ~700% ROI.

## Comparisons

- [PURIST vs Zapier](https://purist.online/pages/purist-vs-green-powders) — Why businesses switch from Zapier to PURIST.
- [PURIST vs Make (Integromat)](https://purist.online/pages/purist-vs-multivitamins) — No operation caps, no platform fees, full code ownership.
- [PURIST vs Hiring In-House](https://purist.online/pages/purist-vs-meal-replacements) — 6x cheaper, 12+ workflows in month one, no knowledge risk.

## Industries Served

- **Dental & Healthcare**: Patient intake automation, appointment reminders, insurance pre-verification, EMR data sync.
- **Real Estate & Property Management**: Tenant communications, maintenance request routing, lease renewal workflows.
- **Marketing & Creative Agencies**: Client reporting, onboarding, billing, campaign monitoring.
- **DTC E-commerce**: Order management, CS ticket routing, inventory alerts, post-purchase sequences.
- **Commercial Law Firms**: Client intake, document processing, billing workflows, deadline tracking.
- **Staffing & Recruitment**: Candidate screening, placement workflows, timesheet processing.

## Technology Stack

- Workflow orchestration: n8n (self-hosted), Make, Zapier
- AI inference: Claude by Anthropic (claude-sonnet, claude-opus)
- State management: Redis, PostgreSQL
- Monitoring: Custom dashboards, Slack alerting, SMS on-call
- Deployment: Vercel, self-hosted VPS
